title: Fringe Academy My First Fringe
description: An introduction to the Brighton Fringe team and discussion on performing at Fringe with artists Aiden Bex, Darryl J Carrington and Katie Reddin-Clancy. They will share their experiences of performing at Brighton Fringe, top tips that you may wish to think about, and how to make it the most enjoyable and memorable experience possible. There will be plenty of time for questions, so don't be shy and join us for this informal and welcoming virtual chat about all things Fringe! Please copy and paste this link into your browser to join the event: https://us02web.zoom.us/j/7800653204?omn=85920504769

reviews.excerpt: The Truman Capote Talk Show is a poignant and informative exposé on the life and death of a great writer. Winner of the Scotsman Fringe First 2024, this one-man play starring Bob Kingdom about the iconic American writer returns to the Edinburgh Fringe at the intimate Attic at Pleasance Courtyard. Capote remains an icon of culture, both popular and amongst our literati, and any staging of his life
